questions.question: Describe the concept of data independence in the context of a database management system, highlighting its relevance to schema architecture. (10 marks)
Compare and contrast second-generation and third-generation database languages, considering their approaches to data definition and data retrieval. (10 marks)
Explain the role of a database interface in facilitating communication between a user and a database management system, and discuss the significance of standardizing database interfaces. (15 marks)
